# marble.fit

> marble is a fast, minimal workout journal for iPhone. Offline. Private. Free. No ads.

marble logs sets, supplements, streaks, and trends — and turns your own numbers into honest coaching: estimated 1RM trends with progression verdicts, a real PR feed, weekly goals with flex weeks, and a private monthly report computed on-device. All data stays on the iPhone.

## Key facts

- Name: marble (App Store name: marble.fit)
- Platform: iPhone
- Price: Free (no subscription, no unlocks)
- Privacy: on-device, no account, no ads, no tracking
- Offline: yes (local-only storage; analysis computed on-device)
- Category: Health & Fitness
- Developer: Lorenzo Quaid Sison

## Features

- Fast set logging (weight, reps, RPE, rest) with Save + Next and last-set recall
- Estimated 1RM trends with plain verdicts: progressing, holding, adapted
- Personal record feed, rep-record tables, and PR-in-reach cues while logging
- Weekly goal with a forgiving streak: bank a flex week every 4 hit weeks
- Private monthly training report with fair month-over-month comparisons
- Muscle-group coverage as weekly hard sets against the 10–20 set guide
- Apple Health import (Apple Watch and Garmin workouts)
- Optional Apple Health export with effort scores toward Apple's Training Load
- Handwritten workout scanning (on-device text recognition)
- Siri and Shortcuts logging (Spotlight, Action button, voice)
- Calendar with streaks; weekly split planner; supplement tracking
- Rest timer Live Activity with Dynamic Island support
- Local reminders that cancel themselves once you've trained
- Light and dark mode

## Links

- [Home](https://marble-fit.app/)
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/marble-fit/id6757725234)
- [Changelog](https://marble-fit.app/changelog/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/enzo-prism/marble)
- [Privacy](https://enzo-prism.github.io/marble/privacy)

## Frequently asked questions

- Is marble free? Yes — every feature, nothing to unlock.
- Does it work offline? Yes — everything is stored on the iPhone.
- Is an account required? No.
- Which devices? iPhone (Apple Watch and Garmin workouts import via Apple Health).
- Ads or tracking? No ads, no tracking, no selling.
- Where does the coaching come from? The user's own logged sets, computed on-device.
